prompt: Write the opening paragraph of a children's book about a shy octopus who wants to make friends.
response: In the shimmering depths of the ocean, where colorful fish danced among swaying seaweed, lived a little octopus named Ollie. Ollie had eight wiggly arms and a soft, shy smile, but he spent most of his days tucked away in his cozy coral cave, peeking out at the world. He watched schools of fish zoom by in games of tag, and turtles glide past with their friends, wishing he could join in the fun. But Ollie was so shy that even saying hello felt as tricky as twisting his tentacles into knots. Deep in his squishy heart, though, he dreamed of making a best friend to share underwater adventures with.
